event_location: La Forêt, Black Forest region of Colorado
event_description: Be it known to all unto whom these summons come that the Black Falcon School of Arms shall host its annual Deed of Arms, the Tournoi du Faucon Noir.
theming_rules_1: Members of the BFSA (knights or squires) shall either be dressed as wildmen or wildwomen, or bear some decoration or token.
theming_rules_2: All visitors from other schools (knights or squires) shall be dressed as Sir Gawain of the Arthurian tale.
theming_rules_3: Each of the dedans shall have their own style under which to be announced during the official Deed.
engagement_rules_1: All normal rules of the Tournoi du Faucon Noir shall be observed.
engagement_rules_2: Unless eating, sleeping, or teaching, no member of the dedans shall refuse a formal challenge.
engagement_rules_3: Each member of the dedans shall conceive of their own thought a specific challenge for which they shall award a token.
engagement_rules_4: In the Knights' Deed, the dedans must meet any challenge while armed de arma silvae.
engagement_rules_5: Each dehors challenger in the Squire's Deed may request that their opponent fight with a woodwose weapon.
engagement_rules_6: At the end of the Deed, all members of the defending dedans shall assemble and choose who should be considered First Among Equals.
